title: Extended servitude subject to rules of prescription
doc_html:
§57.  Extended servitude subject to rules of prescription

An extended mineral servitude is subject to the rules relating to interruption of prescription.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §57, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
